title: Front Office Manager - Aman Resorts India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Aman Resorts India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Aman Resorts India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aman Resorts India:
Aman Resorts India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
